title: Outreach Committee — 2026 Annual Plan
body: Annual plan for 2026 outreach committee. Budget lines: Senior Gifts $2,600 | Christmas Eve Materials $800 | Visit Fuel & Mileage $1,200 | Volunteer Honorarium $2,400 | Christmas Eve Extra Printing $600. Total $7,600. Contact commitments: one contact per quarter for active seniors, one contact per month for homebound households.

title: Treasurer's Q3 2026 Budget Update
body: Actuals through end of September 2026. Senior Gifts: $2,415 (~93% of $2,600). Christmas Eve Materials: $180 (23%). Visit Fuel & Mileage: $1,140 (95%). Volunteer Honorarium: $1,800 (75%). Christmas Eve Extra Printing: $200 (33%). NOTE (per Wallace, Oct 12): October receipts are NOT yet posted here. Trust the committee task ledger (Asana) for the current picture.

title: Pastoral Care & Visitation Policy
body: Active seniors: one contact per quarter (call, visit, or card). Homebound: one contact per month (call or visit preferred over card). Opted-out households: newsletter-only, no direct outreach. Family-request removals stand unless a written family retraction is filed. See senior_outreach_roster for canonical status flags.

title: Christmas Eve 2026 — Run of Show
body: Five services: 6:30 PM Family, 8:00 PM Traditional, 10:30 PM Candlelight (Dec 24); 7:00 PM Watchnight, 10:30 PM Candlelight Prayer (Dec 31). Rehearsal: Dec 20 3:00 PM Fellowship Hall. See Airtable for usher rota; seven slots currently unfilled.

title: Renfro Family Request — Standing Removal
body: Family request from 2024 stands. Confirmed by Sherry Renfro to Deb Prine on 2026-09-22. Do NOT add Hal Renfro to any list without written family retraction. Restated by Deb on 2026-10-19 in #outreach-committee. Pastor Whitlow concurred.
